name: The Real Juggle
author: Poki
description: The Real Juggle is a soccer game that takes freestyle juggling to the next level! It’s not just keepie uppies, here you take direct control of the feet, feeling every touch and weighing every kick as you master the fundamentals of freestyle. Show off your skills and aim to become the most talented soccer freestyler in the world. Think you’ve got the control to keep it going? How to play The Real Juggle? Click and hold to move the feet. Who created The Real Juggle? The Real Juggle is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Sticker Book Puzzle , Family Tree! , Flick Goal , Mr Bullet , The Superhero League , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play The Real Juggle for free? You can play The Real Juggle for free on Poki. Can I play The Real Juggle on mobile devices and desktop? The Real Juggle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
